info.title: AstrBot OpenAPI v1
info.description: Target REST contract for migrating AstrBot HTTP APIs to /api/v1. Dynamic AstrBot configuration payloads are intentionally modeled as open JSON objects because their schemas are provided at runtime by template endpoints. Developer API keys currently support these scopes only: bot, provider, persona, im, config, chat, file, plugin, mcp, skill. The config scope also grants bot and provider access.

config_id.description: Use "default" to remove a custom route and fall back.

type.description: Platform adapter type, such as aiocqhttp, telegram, lark.

username.description: Caller-declared WebChat sender/session owner. This value is used as the message sender identity and may participate in sender-ID-based command permission checks. Treat chat-scoped API keys as trusted backend credentials and map or validate usernames before accepting end-user input.

_skip_user_history.description: Internal WebUI flag for edit/regenerate flows.

plugin_id.description: When set, update this single plugin instead of a batch.

download_url.description: Optional downloadable ZIP URL to use instead of GitHub archive resolution.
Optional downloadable ZIP URL when url is the plugin source page or repository.
